summary: Added explicit Archive Note and Delete Note actions to the Write note detail options menu. Archive saves current edits before moving the note to Archived, and Delete requires a destructive confirmation before removal.

contract_status_changes.contract: Legacy handoff schema backfill for write-note-detail-management-actions
contract_status_changes.before: Legacy handoff predated explicit proof, residual risk, repo cleanliness, and mirror status fields.
contract_status_changes.after: Backfilled only from the existing handoff summary, validation trail, and recorded risks; product history and proof claims were not upgraded beyond the evidence.

residual_risks: The detail action affordance is compile/domain-test verified but has no screenshot/UI regression proof.
Delete remains an explicit hard delete; promoted destination objects must continue degrading gracefully when their source note is missing.
